extensions.name: WakaTime
extensions.description: Tracks coding activity by sending heartbeats to WakaTime via wakatime-cli

extensions.name: Pirate Agent
extensions.description: Adds a Pirate agent that speaks like a swashbuckling sea dog

extensions.name: Generate Tests
extensions.description: Adds /generate-tests command to generate unit tests for files

extensions.name: Questions
extensions.description: Extract questions from messages and display as interactive questionnaire

extensions.name: Theme Switcher
extensions.description: Adds /theme command to switch AiderDesk themes

extensions.name: Plan Mode
extensions.description: Adds a Plan mode that enforces planning before coding

extensions.name: Protected Paths
extensions.description: Blocks file operations on protected paths (.env, .git/, node_modules/)

extensions.name: Permission Gate
extensions.description: Prompts for confirmation before running dangerous bash commands

extensions.name: Ultrathink
extensions.description: Detects 'ultrathink' / 'think hard' and increases reasoning effort

extensions.name: External Rules
extensions.description: Includes rule files from Cursor, Claude Code, and Roo Code

extensions.name: Sound Notification
extensions.description: Plays sound notifications using packs from og-packs

extensions.name: Sandbox
extensions.description: OS-level sandboxing for bash commands using @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime

extensions.name: RTK Auto-Rewrite
extensions.description: Rewrites shell commands to RTK equivalents, reducing token usage by 60-90%

extensions.name: Redact Secrets
extensions.description: Redacts secret values from .env* files in file read results

extensions.name: ChunkHound Search
extensions.description: Provides chunkhound-search tool for semantic code search

extensions.name: ChunkHound Semantic Search Override
extensions.description: Overrides power---semantic_search to use ChunkHound for better semantic understanding

extensions.name: Tree-Sitter Repo Map
extensions.description: Enhanced repository map using tree-sitter parsing with PageRank-based symbol ranking

extensions.name: Context Autocompletion Words
extensions.description: Automatically extracts symbols from context files and adds them to autocompletion

extensions.name: LSP Integration
extensions.description: Language Server Protocol integration for code intelligence and error detection

extensions.name: Plannotator
extensions.description: Plan-based development workflow with visual review

extensions.name: Programmatic Tool Calls
extensions.description: Execute JavaScript code in a sandbox with access to all tools as async functions

extensions.name: UI Placement Demo
extensions.description: Demonstrates all available UI component placement locations in AiderDesk

extensions.name: Multi-Model Run
extensions.description: Run the same prompt across multiple models simultaneously

extensions.name: Providers Quota
extensions.description: Displays API quota information for Synthetic and Z.AI providers in the task status bar

extensions.name: FFF
extensions.description: Fast file content search using FFF (Freakin Fast File Finder) — replaces the internal grep tool

extensions.name: Seek
extensions.description: Fast ranked code search using seek (zoekt) — replaces the internal grep tool

extensions.name: TPS Counter
extensions.description: Displays tokens per second for agent responses with UI components in usage info and message bar

extensions.name: BMAD Method
extensions.description: Provides BMAD mode with structured workflows for planning, designing, and implementing software projects
